query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_delivered, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN price > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_price,
  SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NULL OR price = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_price
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'delivered';
